positive: A minimalist, symmetrical graphic design of a soaring majestic owl perched on a branch, surrounded by intricate celestial patterns and stylized forest foliage. The aesthetic should be modern linework and graphic illustration, combining gothic and natural elements. Use deep indigo blues, emerald greens, and metallic gold accents against a clean cream background. Focus on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and bold outlines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Perfect central composition, highly detailed engraving style, vector illustration, intricate pattern design.
